site.product_summary: Open-source (MIT) AI agent evaluation platform: sandboxed same-task runs, trajectory replay/scorecards, failure promotion, CI release gates, BYOK.
site.stack: Next.js 15 App Router (web/), Vercel, WorkOS AuthKit, dynamic /og, sitemap.ts, robots.ts, llms.txt

strategy.current_focus: Fix crawlability (blocking metadata) then capture long-tail compare + roundup demand where AgentClash is absent from 2026 lists

hypotheses.change: htmlLimitedBots: /.*/ in web/next.config.ts so homepage/enterprise/blog emit <title>/canonical in <head>
hypotheses.expectation: Live Googlebot fetch of https://www.agentclash.dev/ returns <title> containing AgentClash in <head>; site:www.agentclash.dev starts showing results within 2-4 weeks
hypotheses.measure_via: live-url fetch + web-search spot check site:www.agentclash.dev

hypotheses.expectation: App-shell URLs stop appearing in Search Console indexed pages; crawl budget concentrates on marketing/docs

hypotheses.change: New compare pages Maxim AI + MLflow; blog top-ai-agent-evaluation-tools-2026
hypotheses.expectation: Pages indexed; appear for 'Maxim AI alternative agent evaluation' / 'top AI agent evaluation tools 2026' long-tail within 4-6 weeks

hypotheses.change: Pricing added to header + footer nav
hypotheses.expectation: Increased internal PageRank to /pricing; higher organic CTR to pricing from compare/blog within 4 weeks (unmeasured without analytics baseline)
